name: @umbraculum/brewery-core
description: Brewery-vertical brewing calculations (gravity, water chemistry) and brewing-specific unit conversions. Brewery-vertical scope: this package contains brewing-domain math (saccharomyces, mash water profiles, OG/FG/ABV, etc.) and is NOT loaded by non-brewery verticals. The bare @umbraculum/core name is reserved for a future platform-core framework package.
